phrases.intent_en: Ask where the bell tower entrance is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada da torre do sino?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH TAW-rih DOO SEE-noo?
phrases.cultural_note: Visitors should avoid blocking the cobblestone passage while accessing the tower.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a torre do sino.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DOO SEE-noo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the bell tower.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the bell tower.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DOO SEE-noo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a torre do sino.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach Cathedral Viewpoint
phrases.text_local: Como chego ao miradouro da catedral?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo OW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUH kuh-tihd-RAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: The viewpoint offers unobstructed views of the cathedral façade and historic rooftops.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o miradouro da catedral.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUH kuh-tihd-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the cathedral viewpoint.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the cathedral viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUH kuh-tihd-RAHL.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o miradouro da catedral.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Nossa Senhora statue faces
phrases.text_local: Desculpe, para onde está virada a estátua da Nossa Senhora?
phrases.pronunciation: dihsh-KOOW-pih, PUH-ruh OHNG-dih ehs-TAH vee-RAH-duh AH SHTAH-toouh DUH NAW-suh seh-NYOH-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Nossa Senhora statue atop Arco da Vila faces the Ria Formosa lagoon, symbolizing protection over the city and its seafaring history.

likely_response.local: Virada para o mar, sobre o arco.
likely_response.pronunciation: vee-RAH-duh PUH-ruh AW MAHR, SOHB-rih AW AH-ruh-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Facing the sea, above the arch.

responses.english: Facing the sea, above the arch.
responses.phonetic: vee-RAH-duh PUH-ruh AW MAHR, SOHB-rih AW AH-ruh-koo.
responses.local: Virada para o mar, sobre o arco.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach the cathedral viewpoint
phrases.text_local: Como chego ao miradouro da Sé?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo OW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUH SEH?
phrases.cultural_note: The cathedral viewpoint (Sé de Faro) is a short uphill walk from Arco da Vila, offering panoramic views of the old town and Ria Formosa.

likely_response.local: Suba a rua à direita do arco.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-buh AH ROOUH AH dee-RAY-tuh DOO AH-ruh-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Go up the street to the right of the arch.

responses.english: Go up the street to the right of the arch.
responses.phonetic: SOO-buh AH ROOUH AH dee-RAY-tuh DOO AH-ruh-koo.
responses.local: Suba a rua à direita do arco.

phrases.text_local: Como posso chegar ao miradouro da catedral?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo PAW-soo shih-GAHR OW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUH kuh-tihd-RAHL?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o miradouro da catedral. Se precisar de ajuda, pergunte a um guia local certificado ou a um funcionário municipal.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUH kuh-tihd-RAHL. SIH prih-see-ZAHR DIH uh-ZHOO-duh, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH loo-KAHL seh-ruh-tee-fee-KAH-doo OHW AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo moo-nee-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the cathedral viewpoint. If you need help, ask a certified local guide or a city hall worker.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the cathedral viewpoint. If you need help, ask a certified local guide or a city hall worker.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUH kuh-tihd-RAHL. SIH prih-see-ZAHR DIH uh-ZHOO-duh, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH loo-KAHL seh-ruh-tee-fee-KAH-doo OHW AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo moo-nee-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o miradouro da catedral. Se precisar de ajuda, pergunte a um guia local certificado ou a um funcionário municipal.
